subject: Interview Invitation - AI Agent Developer Intern at Helcim
body:
Hi Alex,

Thanks for applying to the AI Agent Developer Intern role at Helcim. We'd like to invite you to a 45-minute virtual interview on Thursday, June 12, 2026 at 2:00 PM MDT.

Meeting link: https://meet.example.com/helcim-interview-alex

Please come prepared to discuss a past Python project and we'll walk through one short LangChain coding exercise. Review LangChain tool calling and basic RAG concepts.

Best,
Sarah - Helcim Talent Team

subject: You're in! LangChain Hackathon Confirmation
body:
Hi,

You're confirmed for the LangChain Hackathon kicking off June 21, 2026. Theme: Build a useful AI agent in 48 hours. Prizes: $5k credits + mentorship.

Form a team or join solo by June 18. Devpost submission link in your dashboard.

subject: Calgary AI Agents Meetup - This Thursday
body: Don't forget: Calgary AI Agents Meetup at Platform Calgary on June 4 at 6 PM. Topic: Building Production LLM Agents. Free pizza and great networking with local AI engineers.

subject: Newsletter: 5 new courses launched this week
body: Hello, this week DeepLearning.AI launched 5 new short courses on RAG, prompt engineering, evaluation, agents, and embeddings. Browse the catalog now.

subject: Re: Application - Junior ML Engineer
body:
Hi Alex,

Thanks for applying. We've reviewed your application and unfortunately we are moving forward with other candidates at this time. We encourage you to reapply in the future.

Best,
RBC Borealis AI Talent
